structured.intro: Coordinated Iranian interdictions on 2026-04-22 resulted in the seizure of **MSC FRANCESCA** and **EPAMINONDAS** plus the grounding of **EUPHORIA**, triggering a catastrophic 92 percent collapse in transits to **9/day versus 110/day baseline** and rendering war risk premiums unquotable for VLCCs and LR2s. AG-East VLCC freight rates have spiked to **$162,000/day—six times the $28,000 baseline**—while **14 dark vessel detections** in 24 hours and confirmed carrier suspensions by Maersk, MSC, Hapag-Lloyd, and CMA CGM signal a near-total breakdown in scheduled Gulf traffic capacity.
